titleStmt.title: SII 40.182: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 182. (A.R. No. B. 317 of 1931.) Singaruṭla, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone set up near a spring in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1240, Kāḷayukti, Jyēshṭha, śu. 11, Thursday, corresponding to 1318 A.D., May 11.
Records the gift of land for conducting worship and offerings to the god Abhinava-Narasiṁhadēva at Sannekaṇḍla for the merit of the king by Immaḍi Leṁkaṁgāru and Karaṇas of the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavarṣaṁbulu 1240 Agunēṁṭi
kālayukta saṁvatsara jyēṣṭha śu 11 gu . svasti
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēsvara kākatiyya pratā
parudradēvamahārājulu sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdaṁbulaṁ brithivirājyaṁbu sēyucu
ṁḍaṁgānu rājavṛtamādigānu Iṁmaḍile
ṁkkaṁgārunnu maṭhakaraṇālunu sthalamu Avu
bhaḷanāthaṁḍunnu sahitamaina kaulukoṁḍrunnu
pratāparudradēva mahārājulakuṁ buṇyamu
gānu sanekaṁda Abhinava nasihyadēvaraku Amu
dupaḍi sātupaḍlaku Uppa sahitamu samasta
dravyamu naviṟinānu muppayi vōtulaku sa
rvvamānyaṁgānu Istimi Ī datti yavvaru lēdaṁnānu
tama peddakoḍku kapālanaṁ gāḍidaveṭṭina dōṣā
naṁ baḍuvāru Aghōranarakānaṁ baḍuvāru .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁvāyō harēti vasuṁdharā
ṣaṣṭirvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyate krimi .
Digital edition of SII 40.182 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
